description: Default capability for the main window. Grants the core defaults (event listen/unlisten, read-only window queries) plus the explicit window-write commands used by the custom Win11 titlebar (minimize / toggle-maximize / close) and the unminimize/show/set-focus needed by the single-instance Rust handler. Also grants dialog:open for Ctrl+O and fs:read-text-file for loading the selected markdown file (PR-2). Filesystem scope is intentionally unrestricted in v0.1: the user explicitly chooses every file they open.
